ab: ya:o kayzaeh ay Somibae:aeh kanSo’ ka rayhil?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: kayzaeh a! niSo’ ’am koza’ rayhil?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: yako mangowip maraS ka rayhil, yako kayzaeh ay Somibae:aeh kanSo’ ka rayhil?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: ya:o ma’ ’okay ’araS ka rayhil.
en: B: I don’t have any money either!

ab: yako mangowip maraS ka rayhil, yako kayzaeh ay Somibae:aeh kanSo’ ka rayhil?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: kayni’! Sa’la’ paSibae:aeh ka rayhil ’iSo’on ’okay pinobih ’iyakin.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven’t paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: yako kayzaeh ay Somibae:aeh ka ’inSo’o’a ka kayba:en?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: kayzaeh a, So’o nonak mari’.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: ya:o kayzaeh ay Somibae:aeh ka ’inSo’a ka kina:at?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: ma’an SipaSibae:aeh ila hi kizaw.
en: B: I lent it to kizaw.

ab: paSibae:aeh ’iyakin ka ritinSiya’ ay?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: ’a:ay! rim’aen pinobih ’iyakin o.
ch: B: 好，但是明天要還給我。
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: ’omoral ila, yako ’okay ’araS ka ra:ma’, paSibae:aeh ’iyakin ka ra:ma’ kayzaeh ay.
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It’s raining, I don’t have an umbrella, can you lend me your umbrella?

ab: ma’an ’aehae’ nanaw ka ra:ma’, ’ita’ roSa’ tapa’onhael tira:ma’!
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let’s stick together!

ab: hini niSo’ Sa’la’ pinaSibae:aeh ka kina:at, kapinobih ’iSo’on.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: So: ’iyakinita’ kano’ kina:at ma’ kayzaeh payaka:i’ ’iyakin.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: yako ’inowan ’am minobih ka rayhil ’iSo’on?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: kayzaeh, So: So’o hayza ila ka rayhil ’isa:a’ pinobih ila.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It doesn’t matter, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: So’o ’inowan ’am minobih ka rayhil ’iyakin?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: ya:o rim’aen ’am minobih ’iSo’on.
en: A: I’ll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: So’o ’inowan ’am minobih ka kina:at ’iyakin?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: kahiya’ ma’an Sipinobih ila ’iSo’on o?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn’t I return it to you yesterday?

ab: hini kaka:at ni ta:in pinaSibae:aeh ’iSo’on ay?
en: A: Did ta:in lend you this pen?

ab: ’ihi’, kaysa’an ma’an Sinibae:aeh kansiya.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: hini kaka:at niSo’ Sinibae:aeh kala ’obay ay?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from ’obay?

ab: ’oka’, ni ’oya’ ma’an binae:iw.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: ’oka’ ila ka timo’, Sa’ila Sibae:aeh kala toway sowiti’ ka timo’.
en: A: We’re out of salt, so let’s go borrow some salt from toway.

ab: ’a:ay, ya:o ta SaSibae:aeh.
en: B: Okay, I’ll borrow it.

ab: payaka:i’ hi hewen pinobih ka rayhil.
en: B: Go tell hewen to give me my money back.

ab: siya Somibae:aeh koza’ rayhil kanSo’?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
